# AGENTS.md Ready Badge

Add this badge to your README to show your repo is agent-ready:

```markdown
[![AGENTS.md Ready](https://img.shields.io/badge/AGENTS.md-Ready-00d4aa?style=flat&logo=markdown)](https://agents.md)
```

Or use the dynamic badge (requires AgentMD validation in CI):

```markdown
[![AGENTS.md](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/validate-agents-md.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO/actions/workflows/validate-agents-md.yml)
```
